channel.title: Posts on Josephine Seah
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Josephine Seah

item.title: Digital Payments in the Speedy Smart City
item.description: What user expectations are set up by digital/cashless payment systems, and what happens when users fall outside that mold?

item.title: Citizen Participation in the Smart City
item.description: What does citizen participation look like in the smart city?

item.title: Digital Health in the Smart City
item.description: What happens when users do not engage with digital health programs as designed, and what can we learn from these moments of friction?

item.title: Closing the Principles to Practice Gap with AI practitioners in Singapore
item.description: What needs to change if we take seriously the organizational and operational challenges facing practitioners building and deploying AI systems?
